title: carduus defloratus subsp. crassifolius
intro: Carduus defloratus subsp. crassifolius, also known as the broad-leaved musk thistle or Musk Thistle, is a plant species within the thistle family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its leaves and flowers. The health benefits associated with Carduus defloratus subsp. crassifolius include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Carduus defloratus subsp. crassifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
